channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Carney says he backs strikes on Iran 'with some regret' as world order frays
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says he supports the strikes on Iran "with some regret" as they represent an extreme example of a rupturing world order.
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says he supports the strikes on Iran "with some regret" as they represent an extreme example of a rupturing world order.

(Image credit: Adrian Wyld/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. submarine sinks Iranian warship in Indian Ocean as conflict widens
item.description: The U.S. and Israel's war with Iran has expanded to the Indian Ocean, as a U.S. submarine sank an Iranian warship in international waters.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Israel's war with Iran has expanded to the Indian Ocean, as a U.S. submarine sank an Iranian warship in international waters.
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid

item.title: A split Senate votes against measure to constrain Trump's authorities in Iran
item.description: Democrats in the Senate were facing an uphill climb Wednesday in their push to restrain President Trump's ability to wage war against Iran.
item.content:encoded:
Democrats in the Senate were facing an uphill climb Wednesday in their push to restrain President Trump's ability to wage war against Iran.

(Image credit: Kevin Dietsch)
item.dc:creator: Lexie Schapitl

item.title: WATCH: How traffic dried up in the Strait of Hormuz since the Iran war began
item.description: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz is "about as wrong as things could go" for global oil markets. Iran achieved it not with a naval blockade, but with cheap drones.
item.content:encoded: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz is "about as wrong as things could go" for global oil markets. Iran achieved it not with a naval blockade, but with cheap drones.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Colossal Biosciences breeds controversy while trying to revive mammoths
item.description: A Texas biotech company is trying to bring mammoths and other extinct creatures back to life. The science is as intriguing as the ethical questions are thorny.
item.content:encoded:
A Texas biotech company is trying to bring mammoths and other extinct creatures back to life. The science is as intriguing as the ethical questions are thorny.

(Image credit: Rob Stein)
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: GOP Rep. Tony Gonzales heads to a runoff in Texas amid a new ethics probe in the House
item.description: Texas Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales has faced increasing pressure from his party to resign or drop out of his race after allegations of an affair with a staffer.
item.content:encoded:
Texas Republican Rep. Tony Gonzales has faced increasing pressure from his party to resign or drop out of his race after allegations of an affair with a staffer.

(Image credit: Samuel Corum)
item.dc:creator: Barbara Sprunt

item.title: Satellite images show Iran school strike hit more buildings than earlier reported
item.description: The images suggest that precision munitions struck other buildings, including a clinic that was also inside the complex.
item.content:encoded: The images suggest that precision munitions struck other buildings, including a clinic that was also inside the complex.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: The 2026 Oscar-nominated documentaries are sensitive and transformative
item.description: This year's Oscar-nominated documentaries include a tale of terminal cancer, dispatches from behind bars in Alabama, and stories from Iran and Russia.
item.content:encoded:
This year's Oscar-nominated documentaries include a tale of terminal cancer, dispatches from behind bars in Alabama, and stories from Iran and Russia.

(Image credit: Netflix)
item.dc:creator: Davi Merchan

item.title: A Biden-era rule sought to stabilize child care. Why Trump wants it gone
item.description: The Trump administration has proposed repealing a Biden-era rule that required states to change how they pay out child care subsidies, citing the potential for fraud.
item.content:encoded:
The Trump administration has proposed repealing a Biden-era rule that required states to change how they pay out child care subsidies, citing the potential for fraud.

(Image credit: Nadezhda1906)
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: Greetings from Southwest Papua, which has some of the world's richest marine biodiversity
item.description: The Raja Ampat islands in Indonesia's Southwest Papua province are a marine biodiversity hotspot and a divers' paradise.
item.content:encoded: The Raja Ampat islands in Indonesia's Southwest Papua province are a marine biodiversity hotspot and a divers' paradise.
item.dc:creator: Claire Harbage
